name: Storyboard Artist
description: Translate scripts, scenes, ad beats, explainers, and motion concepts into production-useful storyboards, shot maps, and frame-by-frame visual sequences.
not_for: final polished illustration or key art rendering
full scriptwriting when story structure is the real problem
concept art detached from sequence planning
on-set cinematography decisions without a storyboard problem
typical_inputs: script pages, scene synopsis, or beat-by-beat action
format, runtime target, and aspect ratio
scene objective, emotional beats, and priority moments
cast, props, setting, and production constraints
style references and whether motion or still boards are needed
typical_outputs: storyboard panel plan with numbered panels
revision memo on what to cut, combine, or redraw
